description: Machine-readable inventory of editable UI Backlot surfaces for focused HyperFrames assembly.

surfaces.title: Editable Browser App
surfaces.fidelity: actual-reference-informed browser chrome plus Airtable-like editable app surface
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS with curated Lucide (ISC) browser-chrome icon symbols vendored via assets/icons/sprite-manifest.json; uses donor repos as geometry reference without vendoring runtime components.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Browser-backed demos such as SaaS tools, internal dashboards, Airtable-like scenes, or web research workflows.

surfaces.title: macOS Calendar App
surfaces.fidelity: actual Apple Calendar screenshot-informed Week scheduling shell
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS adapted from MIT-compatible macOS web references and local-only icon paths.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Scheduling, coordination, and calendar-driven workflow scenes.

surfaces.title: Claude Agent Context Rail
surfaces.fidelity: high — poured verbatim from the pass-100 claude-desktop cowork rail (itself built from public layout description; no live cowork-rail capture exists yet), light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS; no Claude product code, screenshots, video frames, private project data, or app assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Reusable Claude task/status sidecar for demos that need progress, context, artifacts, connectors, or working-file state without the full Claude app shell.
surfaces.deprecatedNote: Folded into claude-composed-app (2026-07-13 consolidation): in reality there are three Claude apps - the Mac app, the web app (same UI), and the CLI. This piece is an internal part of the composed shell, not a standalone app surface. Source file remains and is vendored into the claude-composed-app block.

surfaces.title: Claude Attached Folder Draft
surfaces.fidelity: high against public Claude Cowork layout evidence, pending sanitized live Claude attachment capture
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS; no Claude product code, app assets, or private folder contents copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Pre-submit scenes where a user has attached a local folder or files before Claude starts working.
surfaces.deprecatedNote: Folded into claude-composed-app (2026-07-13 consolidation): in reality there are three Claude apps - the Mac app, the web app (same UI), and the CLI. This piece is an internal part of the composed shell, not a standalone app surface. Source file remains and is vendored into the claude-composed-app block.

surfaces.title: Claude Chat Pane
surfaces.fidelity: no-sidebar chat pane composed from the shared claude-thread-core (cinematic scale) and claude-composer atoms via runtime/backlot-component-loader.js, poured into the Sonnet 4.6 launch-frame rhythm; the pane owns only its topbar chrome
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS extracted from the local lean Claude chat shell; no Claude product code, screenshots, video frames, private account data, app bundle assets, or donor code copied into the component.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Claude chat scenes that need just the active topbar, message field, and composer without sidebar, task rail, browser, Finder, Office, Codex, or desktop chrome.
surfaces.deprecatedNote: Folded into claude-composed-app (2026-07-13 consolidation): in reality there are three Claude apps - the Mac app, the web app (same UI), and the CLI. This piece is an internal part of the composed shell, not a standalone app surface. Source file remains and is vendored into the claude-composed-app block.

surfaces.title: Claude Cinematic Conversation
surfaces.fidelity: consolidated from the six launch/cinematic prototypes (pass 115); canonical tokens + shared response-mark atom, pending official product capture
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS with a mounted shared Claude response-mark primitive informed by public launch-frame studies; no Claude product code, official icon asset, screenshots, video frames, private account data, app bundle assets, donor code, or unclear-license assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: The one zoomed cinematic Claude conversation for close-up video beats: ?beat=prompt (user asks + thinking loader), ?beat=reply (large serif answer + composer), ?beat=complete (done copy). Copy overridable via data-copy slots; add class theme-dark for dark.

surfaces.title: Claude Code Terminal Session
surfaces.fidelity: reference-matched light terminal panel informed by the 2026-02-18 Claude Code-to-Figma video frames
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS informed by local reference frames from the public Claude Code-to-Figma video; no Claude product code, screenshots, video frames, private terminal sessions, private account data, fonts from the source video, or app assets copied into the component.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Small Claude Code terminal-session clips that need the light reference-style panel without importing the dark Claude Code desktop shell or the warm Claude chat shell.

surfaces.title: Claude Canonical Desktop Shell (composed)
surfaces.fidelity: high against pass-100 claude-desktop chat/cowork/code pages (element rects and sampled surfaces pixel-match the claude-desktop captures per page and theme), pending sanitized live Claude full-shell capture
surfaces.assetDecision: Composes local hand-authored Claude components through runtime/backlot-component-loader.js; no Claude product code, screenshots, video frames, private account data, app assets, or donor code copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Canonical parameterized Claude desktop shell: data-page="chat|cowork|code" (default cowork), data-sidebar/data-rail on|off toggles, .theme-dark for dark; one file replaces the stacked claude-desktop pages while keeping sidebar, thread, composer, and rail independently editable atoms. Capture variants: capture:claude-composed-app{,-chat,-code,-dark,-chat-dark}.

surfaces.fidelity: high — poured from the pass-100 live-app-verified claude-desktop shell; data-page="chat|cowork" mirrors the two desktop composer variants, light + .theme-dark via canonical --claude-* tokens
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS; no Claude product code, screenshots, video frames, or app assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Reusable floating Claude composer beats, especially clips that need attachment chips and running controls without the full Claude app shell.

surfaces.title: Codex Desktop Workbench
surfaces.fidelity: official screenshot-informed editable Codex desktop app reconstruction, matching the light-mode project sidebar, active thread, composer, toolbar, review pane structure, and thin rounded icon language; pending sanitized live account capture
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS using official OpenAI screenshot plates, documentation, safe local CLI/app metadata, and Backlot captures as reference evidence only; no OpenAI/Codex app assets, screenshot pixels, product CSS, app code, icon files, private sessions, account data, or copied app bundle assets.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Desktop Codex demos that need a light-mode current app shell with real-product-like sidebar navigation, active thread, model/permission composer, toolbar controls, Git diff review pane, and local-work metadata, without importing Terminal, Claude, Finder, browser, Office, Figma, or Premiere surfaces.

surfaces.title: Codex Terminal
surfaces.fidelity: code-native Terminal/Codex CLI shell, informed by local Codex CLI help and app metadata
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS using local Codex CLI help, Codex app metadata, and Terminal availability as reference context; no Apple, OpenAI, or private session assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Command-line Codex demos, test runs, diffs, and agent execution status scenes.

surfaces.title: Excel-style Workbook
surfaces.fidelity: code-native Office-style spreadsheet shell
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS informed by Fluent UI and ribbon donor references; no Microsoft code, fonts, icons, or private workbook data copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Spreadsheet analysis, formula editing, chart updates, and workbook automation scenes.

surfaces.title: Figma-style Design Editor
surfaces.fidelity: code-native design editor shell
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS informed by public Figma UI documentation; no private Figma account, file, code, or assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Design handoff, frame editing, selection-handle, and Claude-to-design workflow scenes.

surfaces.title: Figma-style Onboarding Editor
surfaces.fidelity: reference-matched dark onboarding editor informed by the 2026-02-18 Claude Code-to-Figma video frames; merged into figma-editor.html as a data-page="onboarding" variant (pass-111), same pattern as the claude-sidebar atom's page switching
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS informed by local reference frames from the public Claude Code-to-Figma video and the existing UI Backlot Figma editor; no Figma product code, screenshots, video frames, private Figma files, private account data, fonts from the source video, or app assets copied into the component.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Claude Code-to-design clips that need the dark onboarding design editor seen in the public reference video, now expressed as the onboarding page of the single canonical figma-editor surface instead of a separate file.

surfaces.title: Finder Launch Deck Window
surfaces.fidelity: high against synthetic Launch Deck reference capture
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS with curated Framework7 (MIT) SF-style icon symbols vendored via assets/icons/sprite-manifest.json; no Apple SF Symbols or app assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: File/folder handoff scenes that need Finder without a full desktop shell.

surfaces.title: macOS Menu Bar
surfaces.fidelity: macos-web-informed editable menu-bar primitive with self-contained Apple glyph and status icons
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS with curated Framework7 (MIT) SF-style status icons vendored via assets/icons/sprite-manifest.json plus one hand-authored Control Center glyph; no Apple SF Symbols or app assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Wrapper compositions that need Mac desktop context without duplicating menu bar HTML/CSS or importing a full desktop lab.

surfaces.title: macOS Dock
surfaces.fidelity: macos-web-informed editable Dock with real app icons, magnification-free layout, and indicator dots
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS Dock shell with recreated/curated app icons documented in assets/app-icons/README.md; no Apple Dock code or assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Desktop scenes that need the Dock as a launch point for app-open beats (used by examples/mac-multi-app-demo.html).

surfaces.title: macOS Wallpaper Catalog
surfaces.fidelity: 75-wallpaper desktop-background catalog: the full macOS lineage (Cheetah→Tahoe) plus Mac/iMac colour masters as real bundled images, and an original CSS set of gradients, metallics, solid colours, and patterns

parameters.data-wallpaper: wallpaper id from surfaces/wallpapers.json (default sonoma); also ?wallpaper=<id> when previewed standalone

surfaces.assetDecision: Bundles real macOS wallpaper images (Apple-owned) so non-Mac users get desktop backdrops: lineage sourced from the 512pixels.net 6K archive, Mac/iMac colour masters converted from this machine's /System/Library/Desktop Pictures. Provenance + licensing in assets/wallpapers/NOTICE.md. Delete assets/wallpapers/macos+thumbs and run npm run wallpapers:assets to re-source locally; the CSS wallpapers are original and always ship.
surfaces.recommendedUse: The desktop background layer behind mac-menu-bar, mac-dock, and app windows. Pick any of 75 wallpapers via data-wallpaper (e.g. sonoma, catalina-day, big-sur-color-day, solid-space-gray, mesh-aurora).

surfaces.title: Premiere-style Video Editor
surfaces.fidelity: code-native video editor shell
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS informed by public Premiere documentation and MIT timeline donor patterns; no Adobe code, fonts, private projects, or assets copied.
surfaces.recommendedUse: Video editing, timeline manipulation, captions, clip trimming, and review workflow scenes.

surfaces.recommendedUse: Document editing, review, comments, tracked-change, and memo workflow scenes.

surfaces.title: Slack Workspace App
surfaces.fidelity: editable Slack desktop app shell informed by real Slack v4.50.143 native app captures and App Store screenshots
surfaces.assetDecision: Hand-authored HTML/CSS informed by real Slack desktop app chrome (sidebar, icon rail, workspace switcher, message list, compose box) and App Store screenshots; uses curated icon symbols for sidebar navigation and message tools; no Slack product code, app assets, private workspace data, or private messages copied.
